name: chain_14_ph_launches_today__high_quality_b2b_
method: 14 PH launches today - HIGH quality B2B leads. 48h outreach window. Cold email: congrats on launch + offer beta access. File: leads/producthunt_b2b_leads.csv

stages.task: scrape PH today page, extract B2B launches with founder names, product descriptions, upvote counts
filter B2B, score by relevance (SaaS/dev tools/productivity = high), enrich with contact data
generate personalized cold emails: congrats on launch + position our EAS/service as complementary beta
send batch via cold_email_2026.py, log to OUTREACH_PIPELINE.csv, expire stale leads
